headline: Why Is Jacobs Solutions (J) Down 4.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Jacobs Solutions (J) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Why United Rentals (URI) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of equipment rental company United Rentals (NYSE:URI) jumped 5.4% in the afternoon session after UBS raised its price target on the stock, reflecting increased confidence in a rebound for the U.S. non-residential construction market.
